name: node-api-example
description: Example Node.js API project used to validate BrikByteOS CI templates.

scripts.test:integration: mkdir -p out && NODE_OPTIONS='--experimental-vm-modules' c8 --reporter=json --reporter=json-summary --report-dir=coverage node --test --test-reporter=spec --test-reporter=junit --test-reporter-destination=out/junit.xml tests/integration

author: BrikByte Studios
